global_settings.aesthetic: Highly detailed, professional, and hyper-realistic infographic poster. Modern, corporate, 3D tech-render aesthetic. Avoid cartoonish styles.
global_settings.color_palette: Deep blues, crisp whites, and vibrant data-viz colors (greens, oranges, reds).
global_settings.resolution: 8k, photorealistic, studio lighting, isometric or symmetrical composition.

header_section.text: The Smability Ecosystem: Intelligent Data Protecting Communities
header_section.branding: Incorporate corporate branding in the top corners.

core_ecosystem_center.smaa_os: A glowing, high-tech central hub representing 'SMAA OS' connected to the AWS cloud.
core_ecosystem_center.airegpt: A sleek smartphone mockup showing a Telegram message alert for AireGPT.

hardware_nodes_perimeter.instruction: Orbiting the central hub, connected by digital glowing data lines. Use the exact provided reference images for the devices.

nodes.description: Render the exact hardware device from the reference image. Show it as a robust monitoring box with a solar panel, microphone for dBA, and air quality vents.
Render the exact hardware device from the reference image. White solid-state weather station mounted on a metallic pole.
Render the exact hardware device from the reference image. Compact grey sensor box for air quality.

GENERATE SCENE FROM SCRATCH: Since there is no reference image, generate a hyper-realistic 3D cutaway view of an underground water cistern or water tank. Show a submersible piezometer probe inside the water measuring the level, connected to a rugged transmission module outside. Focus on 'Water Tank and Cistern Monitoring'.

floating_data_models.instruction: Integrate semi-transparent, high-tech data visualization widgets floating near their respective hardware nodes, using the reference images provided.

footer_section.content: Clean, minimal typography listing core value propositions: Reliable Connectivity (4G/Wi-Fi/Solar), End-to-End Security, Scalable Cloud, Actionable AI Alerts.
